channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole, 6th May
item.description:
Foot of Charlton Abbotts hill, from Saltway toward Charlton Abbots
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sudeley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes on a road, 6th May
item.description:
Potholes on highways access strip between road and property boundary The access strip which is owned by highways is breaking up and regularly potholes are appearing As the road is shortly due for surfacing, can the access strip be repaired as it is repeatedly causing our vehicles to bump over the potholes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charlton Abbots Road, Sudeley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 6th May
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 days footway aburt level difference footway closure 1000x300x25mm stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 6th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway closure please lift and replace x1 raised broken 900x600x20 slab (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 6th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway aburt level difference footway closure please lift and relay x1 raised 600x600x20 slab (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 6th May
item.description:

item.description:
